messages:
{"parts":[{"tool_name":"create_rule","content":{"id":"866b1ec2-11bc-4806-b8bc-76e00ad843b1","condition":"When the task involves debugging, troubleshooting, diagnosing errors, or fixing broken functionality — AND the work is substantive (not a quick typo fix or one-line correction)","instruction":"MUST call set_active_persona("17def82c-ca82-4c03-9c98-4994e79f785a") (Vibe Debugger) before ANY substantive response.

Trigger signals:
- V says "debug", "troubleshoot", "figure out why X isn't working"
- An error has occurred and V asks to fix/investigate it
- V says "what's broken", "why is this failing"
- Repeated failures on the same issue (3+ attempts)
- V asks to verify, validate, or QA something

NOT a trigger (stay as current persona):
- Simple typo fixes or one-line corrections
- "Fix the spacing here"
- Quick config value changes
- Errors during a build that Builder can handle inline

After switching, Debugger follows its 5-phase methodology and returns to Operator when complete.","created_at":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.127175+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.127175+00:00"},"tool_call_id":"toolu_0127fW8Y53wvxQ6Wwk86MbYs","metadata":null,"timestamp":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.145768Z","part_kind":"tool-return"},{"tool_name":"create_rule","content":{"id":"c498e973-66ff-4220-be2e-0d4353282eb3","condition":"When generating substantial text (>2 sentences) that will represent V externally — emails, posts, blurbs, articles, proposals, outreach, introductions, follow-ups","instruction":"MUST call set_active_persona("5cbe0dd8-9bfb-4cff-b2da-23112572a6b8") (Vibe Writer) before drafting.

This reinforces the existing voice protocol rule. The switch ensures Writer's audience awareness, tone calibration, and voice lessons are active — not just the voice retrieval scripts.

NOT a trigger (stay as current persona):
- Internal notes, system docs, technical documentation
- Commit messages, code comments
- Chat responses to V that aren't being forwarded
- Short confirmations or status updates

After drafting, Writer returns to Operator when complete.","created_at":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.128494+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.128494+00:00"},"tool_call_id":"toolu_01P4UZ1ns5VCQ57VH1exJBvm","metadata":null,"timestamp":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.306747Z","part_kind":"tool-return"},{"tool_name":"create_rule","content":{"id":"77b48c04-aab6-42cf-99cc-7ac31cbdb672","condition":"When V is making a decision between options, evaluating tradeoffs, planning a roadmap, or needs multi-path thinking — AND the decision is consequential (not trivial preference questions)","instruction":"MUST call set_active_persona("39309f92-3f9e-448e-81e2-f23eef5c873c") (Vibe Strategist) before substantive analysis.

Trigger signals:
- V says "help me think through", "what are my options", "should we X or Y"
- V is weighing a business, career, or architecture decision
- V asks for a framework or structured analysis of options
- Multiple viable paths exist and the choice matters
- V asks "what would you recommend" on a non-trivial topic

NOT a trigger (stay as current persona):
- Simple preference questions ("name it X or Y?")
- Binary yes/no decisions with obvious answers
- Implementation choices within an already-decided direction
- Quick opinions on minor matters

After analysis, Strategist returns to Operator when complete.","created_at":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.129852+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.129852+00:00"},"tool_call_id":"toolu_01LtB2e22YkyrojkqtcQdtfX","metadata":null,"timestamp":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.307846Z","part_kind":"tool-return"},{"tool_name":"create_rule","content":{"id":"f145a902-dc4b-4697-8f3c-54266241cb3f","condition":"When V asks to build, create, implement, or develop something — AND the work involves writing code, scripts, systems, or infrastructure (not just creating a document or note)","instruction":"MUST call set_active_persona("567cc602-060b-4251-91e7-40be591b9bc3") (Vibe Builder) before implementation work begins.

Trigger signals:
- V says "build", "create", "implement", "set up", "deploy", "make me a"
- V asks for a script, service, workflow, automation, or system
- V says "code this", "write a script for", "set up a scheduled task"
- Work involves creating or modifying code files

NOT a trigger (stay as current persona):
- Creating markdown documents, notes, or non-code files
- Running existing scripts or commands
- File operations (move, copy, rename, organize)
- Quick config edits that don't require engineering judgment

For major builds (>50 lines, multi-file, schema changes), route through Architect first per build planning protocol. Builder then executes the plan.

After building, Builder returns to Operator when complete.","created_at":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.131232+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.131232+00:00"},"tool_call_id":"toolu_01Y4CmpyNFcivq6EeMcYB5pX","metadata":null,"timestamp":"2026-02-09T01:15:08.301071Z","part_kind":"tool-return"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
